title: T-082 — NonConformance event contract for Technical PO/TO triggers
prompt:
# T-082 — NonConformance event contract for Technical PO/TO triggers

Define the shared event contract emitted by Technical when PO receipt actuals or TO transfer actuals need non-conformance handling. Event name: `non_conformance.requested` unless an existing platform convention is found and documented. Payload must include source_module, source_event_name, source_event_id, idempotency_key, org_id, item_id, lot_id when present, supplier_id when present, purchase_order_id/transfer_order_id when present, reason_codes, severity, observed_values, expected_values, detected_at, detected_by, and recommended_owner `technical|quality|warehouse|procurement`. Provide schema validation and outbox/idempotency tests. RED first: T-076/T-077 payloads validate against this contract and retries do not duplicate NCR requests.

pipeline_inputs.description: Shared NCR request event schema used by Technical PO and TO actual variance triggers.
pipeline_inputs.details: This task does not implement 09-QUALITY investigation workflow. It creates the contract, schema validator and Technical outbox helper so PO/TO triggers can request NCR consistently. If 09-QUALITY tables/events already exist, map to that canonical contract and document the mapping. PO and TO triggers remain Technical-side producers; Quality may be consumer/owner.
acceptance_criteria: Given T-076 emits PO price/spec/allergen variance, then payload validates with source_event_name=po.receipt_actual_recorded and reason_codes from the PO variance set.
Given T-077 emits TO shelf-life/location/temperature variance, then payload validates with source_event_name=to.transfer_actual_recorded and reason_codes from the TO variance set.
Given the same idempotency_key is emitted twice, then one outbox/NCR request exists and duplicate attempt returns existing reference.
Given 09-QUALITY contract exists, then this task maps to it without creating a divergent Technical-only payload.
Given D365 is disabled, then NCR request still emits from local PO/TO events without D365 identifiers.
test_strategy: RED contract tests with valid and invalid PO/TO payload fixtures.
RED idempotency test around outbox helper.
risk_red_lines: Do not implement Quality NCR workflow screens.
Do not mutate master data while emitting NCR requests.
Do not require D365 identifiers in the contract.
